message:

RusticMaple: web/server.rs — run_web_server_with_cx + wait_for_
shutdown_signal_with_cx added. Orchestrator-level cx threading
means caller-initiated cx-cancel triggers same graceful-shutdown
path as SIGTERM. web/server.rs cx coverage 3/3.
